mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inv (commodity_Id, warehouse_Id, inv_Amount) VALUES (#{commodityId}, #{warehouseId}, #{amount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE inv_Amount = VALUES(inv_Amount)
mapper.update: INSERT INTO allinv (commodity_Id, allinv_Amount) SELECT commodity_Id, SUM(inv_Amount) FROM inv GROUP BY commodity_Id ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE allinv_Amount = VALUES(allinv_Amount)
mapper.select: SELECT commodity_Id, warehouse_Id, inv_Amount, inv_Time FROM inv WHERE commodity_Id = #{commodityId}
